default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync for the pod Jason team to discuss client accounts and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Augment content strategy is nearing completion; team to refine agentic workflow for better content output](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Webflow SEO efforts need improvement; team to push for title tag and meta description implementation](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Surge account requires better project management layer and work stream ownership](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Dev/design requests should be submitted via Linear with clear deliverables and assigned to Ed for delegation](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Sydney: Works on strategy sprints, focusing on Webflow; background in content creation and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Marisol: Working on Augment Codes project; diverse background including teaching and full-stack development](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

### Augment Content Strategy

### Webflow SEO Optimization

  - [Need for separate title tag and meta description fields](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

### Surge Account Management

  - [Goal to shift accountability to Surge team and get clear definitions of value](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Dev and Design Workflow (Edin's Input)

  - [Linear is the preferred platform for task management](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [No strict rules for ticket writing, but clear deliverables and info dumping are helpful](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [Tickets can be assigned to Edin for delegation to the appropriate team member](https://fathom.video/share/TyfxRbKDawsttdr--bHBt21TQwH-qXbN?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)

## Next Steps
